stemHtml: A Doppler VOR provides usable signals up to what distance from the station and is intended for which type of traffic?

options.a: Up to 100 NM from DVOR for military IFR traffic.
options.b: Up to 75 NM from the terminal area for all traffic within the control zone.
options.c: Up to 200 NM from DVOR for en-route IFR Traffic.
options.d: Up to 25 NM from the approach area for traffic following LNAV Approaches.
